problem id: d6844056
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(4)

examples:
  01101010 -> 00000110
  10000100 -> 00001000
  10011010 -> 00001001
  01100010 -> 00000110
  00110110 -> 00000011
  01101001 -> 00000110
  11010010 -> 00001101
  01001110 -> 00000100
  00010010 -> 00000001

query: 10110001
predicted answer: 00001011
